name: daedalus-marketplace
description: Daedalus: a drop-in HTML editor that turns any static page into a round-trip editable, presentable, exportable artifact.

plugins.name: daedalus
plugins.description: Generate self-contained HTML artifacts with a built-in editor — click anywhere to edit text, swap photos, reorder blocks, autosave to localStorage, export to PDF, present fullscreen. No build step, no install, works offline.
